verse.name: V1
verse.lines: In prisoner’s chains, With bleeding stripes, Paul and Silas prayed that night; And in their pain, began to sing, Their chains were loosed, And they were free.

verse.name: C2
verse.lines: I bless Your Name, I bless Your Name, I give You honor, give You praise; You are the Life, the Truth, the Way, I bless Your Name, I bless Your Name.

verse.name: V3
verse.lines: Some midnight hour, If you should find, You’re in a prison in your mind; Reach out and pray, Defy those chains, And they will fall in Jesus Name.

verse.name: V4
verse.lines: This midnight hour, We find ourselves, Squeezed by Satan on all sides; But still we bless God’s holy Name, For as we praise, His Pow’r us raise!
